title: Quebec investors, entrepreneurs and self-employed persons : Work permit options while seeking permanent residence - Canada.ca
content:
Quebec investors, entrepreneurs and self-employed persons

## Work permit options while seeking permanent residence
You may be eligible to get a work permit as a Quebec investor, entrepreneur or self-employed person while you’re seeking permanent residence.
You may be able to apply for either of the following work permits. Check the eligibility criteria before you apply.
- Open work permit for Quebec investors
- Bridging open work permit
You may be eligible to apply for an employer-specific work permit.
Learn more about working in Quebec as an entrepreneur (PDF, 996 KB) (in French only).
- To find the information on working in Canada, go to page 67.
You may be eligible to apply for an employer-specific work permit if you’ve received a Quebec Selection Certificate ( Certificat de sélection du Québec ) .
Learn about applying to work in Canada before you get permanent residence .
